product: Databricks Assistant is now Genie Code
tagline: Databricks Assistant is now Genie Code, with expanded agentic capabilities for autonomous, multi step data tasks.
what_it_does: Databricks Assistant is now Genie Code, with expanded agentic capabilities for autonomous, multi step data tasks. Genie Code Agent mode is now generally available for data science, data engineering, and dashboard authoring. note Starting July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products are billed following a pay as you go pricing model that includes a per user free monthly allowance.
why_it_matters: Account admins can manage budgets and cost controls for Genie.

capabilities.desc: Genie Code is integrated with Databricks notebooks and optimized to automate exploratory data analysis and model training.

key_takeaway: Databricks Assistant is now Genie Code, with expanded agentic capabilities for autonomous, multi step data tasks.
